schema_note: Same grid as S-04 (floor 1). specs{} (keyed by element_id) dedups the repeated width/height/main_bar/stirrup block per section 7, joined from S-08. '(ชพ)' suffix on some beam labels = ชานพัก (stair landing level) -- a split-level beam sitting at the landing height, not full floor-2 level, per this sheet's own note ('- ชพ. = ระดับชานพัก'). The stairwell area (D1/D2/C1/C2 bay) shows a hatched hexagonal 'ST' void symbol -- the actual stair opening -- corresponding to the less-clear dashed box in the same position on S-04 (floor 1), confirming that bay is a stairwell void through both floors, not a normal room. Elements ordered top-to-bottom, left-to-right, vertical-before-horizontal at shared start points, per section 4.

elements.description: hatched hexagonal stair opening/void, floor 2, spanning roughly D1/D2 to C1/C2 bay (east boundary likely at dummy grid 1''(2.35) = the stair/hall partition; on floor 1 (S-04/หน้า31) a real B2 vertical beam sits at 1'' as the stairwell east wall -- on this floor-2 void the same line is the void's east edge)

warnings: Unlike floor 1 (S-04), this sheet's row-E extension (dummy grids 1'/3') does NOT show an obvious separate small bay-window box with slab marker -- the extension may only be a ground-floor architectural feature (e.g. a covered entry bay) that doesn't repeat at floor 2, OR floor 2's wall may simply sit flush at grid 1/3 without a beam jog. Not extracted as beam segments here pending confirmation; if the architecture floor-plan agent's 2nd-floor plan clarifies this, update accordingly.

B4X at B3/A3 is flagged because the grid master's footprint note (derived from S-02/S-03) says the ground floor has no column/footing at A3 -- if floor 2 genuinely extends further at this corner than floor 1, that's a real cantilever/overhang worth flagging prominently, not silently normalizing to match floor 1.

'B1(ชพ)' is recorded with a distinct element_id suffix (B1_ชพ) rather than merged into regular 'B1' entries, since it sits at a different level (stair landing) even though it shares B1's cross-section spec.
CORRECTED_2026-07-16: B3X and B4's additional_bars merged into main_bar per the corrected S-08 (หน้า35) spec, matching the fixes made to the floor-1 beam plan (หน้า31).

NOTE_2026-07-19: dummy grids 1''(2.25)/A'(12.75)/A''(13.7) added to the master by user. Relevant here: (a) stair void east edge likely = 1'' (see ST element flag); (b) B4X at B3-A3 sits in the B-to-A strip north of A -- A'/A'' are further south and do not resolve that flag; no beam recorded south of row A on this sheet.
